# How to Apply as a Vendor

Ready to join Fleet Feast and grow your food truck business? This guide walks you through the vendor application process.

## Before You Apply

### Requirements Checklist

Ensure you have all requirements before starting:

**Business Essentials:**
- [ ] Active food truck business
- [ ] Valid business license (current)
- [ ] Food handler's permit/certification
- [ ] Health department permits
- [ ] Tax ID/EIN

**Insurance:**
- [ ] General liability insurance ($1M minimum coverage)
- [ ] Commercial auto insurance
- [ ] Workers' compensation (if you have employees)
- [ ] Current insurance certificates (PDF format)

**Vehicle:**
- [ ] Food truck/trailer in good working condition
- [ ] Current vehicle registration
- [ ] Recent inspection certificate
- [ ] Meets health and safety standards

**Documentation:**
- [ ] High-quality photos of your truck (exterior and interior)
- [ ] Menu with pricing
- [ ] Photos of your food items
- [ ] Business contact information

## Application Process Overview

```
1. Create Account → 2. Submit Application → 3. Document Upload
                                                ↓
6. Start Booking ← 5. Setup Profile ← 4. Wait for Approval
                                      (3-5 business days)
```

## Step-by-Step Instructions

### 1. Create Your Account

**Navigate to Application:**
- Go to www.fleetfeast.com
- Click "Become a Vendor" in the main menu
- Select "Start Application"

**Create Login Credentials:**
- Email address (will be your login)
- Strong password (8+ characters, mix of letters/numbers)
- Confirm password
- Check "I agree to Vendor Terms of Service"

**Verify Email:**
- Check your email inbox
- Click verification link
- Return to complete application

### 2. Business Information

Complete all required business details:

**Basic Information:**
- **Business Name**: Legal name of your business
- **DBA** (if different): "Doing Business As" name
- **Business Type**:
  - Sole Proprietorship
  - LLC
  - Corporation
  - Partnership
- **Tax ID/EIN**: Federal tax identification number
- **Year Established**: When business started operating

**Contact Information:**
- **Primary Contact Name**: Owner or manager
- **Phone Number**: Best number to reach you
- **Email**: Business email (can be same as login)
- **Business Address**: Physical address (not PO Box)
- **Service Area**: Where you're willing to travel

**Operational Details:**
- **Cuisine Type(s)**: Select all that apply
  - American
  - Mexican
  - Asian
  - Italian
  - BBQ
  - Desserts
  - Vegetarian/Vegan
  - Other
- **Truck Type**:
  - Food truck
  - Food trailer
  - Converted vehicle
  - Cart/kiosk

### 3. Upload Required Documents

**Business License:**
- Upload clear photo or PDF
- Must show current expiration date
- Ensure all text is legible
- Accepted formats: PDF, JPG, PNG

**Food Handler's Permit:**
- Current certification
- Must include your name or business name
- Valid expiration date required

**Health Department Permits:**
- Current health permit
- Operating license
- Any additional required permits

**Insurance Certificates:**
- General liability ($1M minimum)
- Commercial auto insurance
- Workers' comp (if applicable)
- Must show current coverage dates
- Include declaration page showing coverage amounts

**Vehicle Documentation:**
- Vehicle registration
- Recent inspection certificate (within 6 months)
- Any required mobile food vendor permits

**Tip**: Scan documents or take clear, well-lit photos. Blurry or illegible documents will delay approval.

### 4. Food Truck Information

**Vehicle Details:**
- **Make/Model**: Truck manufacturer and model
- **Year**: Vehicle year
- **License Plate**: State and number
- **VIN**: Vehicle identification number
- **Color/Appearance**: Describe the truck's look

**Equipment:**
- Cooking equipment you have
- Power requirements (if any)
- Water requirements (if any)
- Generator (self-powered or need hookup)
- Capacity: Meals per hour you can serve

**Photos** (Required - minimum 5):
1. Truck exterior (front view)
2. Truck exterior (side view showing service window)
3. Interior cooking area
4. Service window/counter
5. Equipment and setup

**Photo Requirements:**
- High resolution (min 1024x768)
- Well-lit and clear
- Recent (within 6 months)
- Clean, professional appearance
- Max 10MB per photo

### 5. Menu and Pricing

**Upload Your Menu:**
- Current menu (PDF, image, or typed)
- Include item descriptions
- Show pricing
- Note dietary information (vegan, gluten-free, etc.)
- Highlight signature items

**Menu Requirements:**
- All items must be listed
- Prices clearly stated
- Allergen information
- Portion sizes (where applicable)

**Service Style:**
- Individual orders
- Family style
- Buffet
- Pre-plated
- Custom packages

**Pricing Structure:**
- [ ] Per person
- [ ] Per event (flat rate)
- [ ] Combination
- [ ] Custom quotes

**Minimum Requirements:**
- Minimum guest count (if any)
- Minimum booking fee (if any)
- Minimum advance notice needed

### 6. Service Preferences

**Event Types** (Select all you serve):
- [ ] Private parties
- [ ] Weddings
- [ ] Corporate events
- [ ] Festivals
- [ ] Public events
- [ ] School events
- [ ] Fundraisers

**Service Area:**
- **Base Location**: Your primary operating city
- **Max Travel Distance**: How far you'll travel
- **Travel Fees**: (Auto-calculated or custom)
- **Areas You Won't Serve**: (Optional)

**Availability:**
- Days of the week you operate
- Typical hours
- Seasonal availability
- Blackout dates (holidays you don't work)

**Booking Preferences:**
- Lead time needed (e.g., "2 weeks minimum")
- Max advance booking (e.g., "6 months")
- Preferred event duration
- Setup time required

### 7. Banking Information

**For Payment Processing:**
- Bank name
- Routing number
- Account number
- Account type (checking/savings)
- Account holder name

**Verification:**
- Stripe will send 2 micro-deposits (under $1 each)
- Verify amounts in your account within 2-3 days
- Enter amounts on Stripe verification page
- Account activated for payments

**Note**: This information is securely stored by Stripe, our payment processor. Fleet Feast never stores your bank account details.

### 8. Background Check Authorization

**Required Information:**
- Full legal name
- Date of birth
- Social Security Number (encrypted, secure)
- Driver's license number

**Purpose:**
- Verify identity
- Check business credentials
- Ensure platform safety
- Standard for all vendors

**Privacy:**
- Information is encrypted
- Used only for verification
- Not shared with customers
- Secured by third-party background check provider

### 9. Review and Submit

**Final Checklist:**
- [ ] All sections completed
- [ ] Documents uploaded
- [ ] Photos added
- [ ] Menu uploaded
- [ ] Banking info entered
- [ ] Background check authorized
- [ ] Application reviewed

**Submit:**
- Click "Review Application"
- Check for any missing information
- Read Vendor Agreement
- Check "I agree to Vendor Agreement"
- Click "Submit Application"

**Confirmation:**
- Application submitted successfully
- Confirmation email sent
- Application ID assigned
- Next steps outlined

## After You Submit

### What Happens Next

**Immediate:**
- Application ID emailed to you
- Status: "Under Review"
- Estimated review time: 3-5 business days

**Review Process:**

**Day 1-2: Document Verification**
- Business license checked
- Insurance certificates reviewed
- Health permits validated
- Vehicle documentation verified

**Day 2-3: Background Check**
- Identity verification
- Business credentials checked
- Safety screening
- References contacted (if provided)

**Day 3-4: Quality Review**
- Photos reviewed
- Menu evaluated
- Service offering assessed
- Fit for platform determined

**Day 4-5: Final Decision**
- Approval or request for additional info
- Email notification sent

### Possible Outcomes

**1. Approved ✅**
- Congratulations email sent
- Account activated
- Access to vendor dashboard
- Can set up profile and calendar
- Can start receiving bookings

**2. Additional Information Needed 📋**
- Specific items listed
- 7 days to provide information
- Resubmit updated documents
- New review timeline provided

**3. Denied ❌**
- Reason for denial explained
- May reapply in 90 days
- Can appeal decision within 14 days

### If Approved

**Immediate Next Steps:**
1. Complete your vendor profile
2. Upload additional photos (recommended 10-15)
3. Set up your calendar and availability
4. Set your booking preferences
5. Configure notifications
6. Review dashboard features

**See:**
- [How to Set Up Your Profile](./setup-profile.md)
- [How to Manage Your Calendar](./manage-calendar.md)

### If Additional Info Needed

**Respond Quickly:**
1. Check email for specific requirements
2. Log in to your application
3. Upload missing/updated documents
4. Resubmit for review
5. Turnaround time: 2-3 days

**Common Requests:**
- Higher resolution photos
- Updated insurance certificates
- Additional permits
- Clearer documentation
- Missing information

### If Denied

**Understanding the Decision:**
- Review the denial reason carefully
- Common reasons:
  - Incomplete insurance coverage
  - Expired permits
  - Failed background check
  - Truck doesn't meet standards
  - Insufficient documentation

**Your Options:**

**1. Appeal (within 14 days):**
- Email: vendors@fleetfeast.com
- Subject: "Application Appeal - [Your Application ID]"
- Provide additional context or documentation
- Review within 5-7 business days

**2. Reapply (after 90 days):**
- Fix issues that led to denial
- Ensure all requirements met
- Submit new application

**3. Request Clarification:**
- Contact vendor support
- Ask specific questions about denial
- Understand what needs improvement

## Application Tips

### Increase Your Approval Chances

**Documentation:**
✅ Upload clear, high-quality documents
✅ Ensure all certificates are current
✅ Double-check expiration dates
✅ Provide complete information

**Photos:**
✅ Use good lighting
✅ Show truck when it's clean
✅ Capture professional appearance
✅ Include variety of angles
✅ Showcase your best food

**Menu:**
✅ Professional formatting
✅ Clear descriptions
✅ Accurate pricing
✅ Note special dietary options
✅ Highlight unique offerings

**Profile:**
✅ Write compelling business description
✅ Explain what makes you unique
✅ Share your story
✅ Highlight experience and expertise

### Common Mistakes to Avoid

❌ Incomplete application
❌ Blurry or poor quality photos
❌ Expired insurance or permits
❌ Inaccurate information
❌ Missing required documents
❌ Ignoring follow-up requests
❌ Rushing through application

## Costs and Fees

### Application Fee

**No Application Fee!**
- Free to apply
- Free to create account
- No upfront costs
- No monthly fees

### Platform Fees (After Approval)

**Commission Structure:**
- Standard: 15% per booking
- Loyalty (50+ bookings): 10% per booking

**What's Included:**
- Payment processing
- Platform access
- Marketing and promotion
- Customer support
- Booking management tools
- Insurance verification

**When You're Charged:**
- Only when you complete bookings
- Automatically deducted from payments
- Transparent breakdown provided
- Detailed in monthly statements

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How long does approval take?**
A: Typically 3-5 business days. Complex applications may take longer.

**Q: Can I operate while waiting for approval?**
A: No, you must be approved before receiving booking requests.

**Q: Do I need a physical location?**
A: No, but you need a valid business address for tax and legal purposes.

**Q: What if my insurance is about to expire?**
A: Apply now and upload renewal when available. We'll flag for update.

**Q: Can I apply if I'm just starting my food truck?**
A: Yes, but you must have all required permits and insurance before approval.

**Q: What if I operate multiple trucks?**
A: Contact vendors@fleetfeast.com for multi-truck account setup.

**Q: Do you accept food trailers?**
A: Yes, as long as all requirements are met.

**Q: Can I change my information after applying?**
A: Yes, you can update most information in your vendor dashboard after approval.

**Q: What if I'm denied?**
A: Review the reason, fix issues, and reapply after 90 days or appeal within 14 days.

**Q: Is there a referral program?**
A: Yes! Refer other vendors and earn bonuses. Details after approval.
